raw_samples.note: Only emoji + 400-weight large heading on the page — AI feature deliberately breaks the 700-bold default
Deep slate panel — only non-white non-tinted surface on home
Logo + brand-mark only on home — does not propagate into product chrome on map surface
Full-pill 42px — distinctive vs Zigbang 10px chips; one of only two weight-500 occurrences

tier1_official_ds_status: AUTHORITATIVE NEGATIVE — design.dabangapp.com / brand.dabangapp.com / tech.dabangapp.com / docs.dabangapp.com all DNS no-resolve (000); dabangapp.com/brand and /design return 200 but are SPA-routed back to home shell (title still '부동산 필수 앱 다방'); GitHub org `forgeinc/stationTHREE` has 1 repo only (corporate marketing site), no design-system / tokens / storybook repo; getdesign.md and styles.refero.design empty for 'dabang'. Production :root token system (140 CSS custom properties) is the authoritative public artifact and was captured directly.
ip_guardrails: Brand logo / pink-500 / app name referenced for inspiration only (analytical fair-use of factual CSS values)
No verbatim Dabang marketing copy or taglines reproduced
Service-feature names (지도 · 분양 · 관심목록 · 우리동네 한눈에 보기) used descriptively, not as adopted copy
Voice samples in §10 are fresh OmD-original reconstructions in casual-polite Korean — explicitly marked tone-shape-only
flags_for_update_pass: Product-detail page (개별 매물 상세) not inspected — spacing scale and price-detail typography pending
Filter modal / sort-by sheet not captured — exact filter-chip state variants (active/disabled) inferred
Mobile viewport (390×844) not captured this pass — Dabang is mobile-first, recommend follow-up
